title: M54 stepwise moment derivation and normalization audit
summary: Derived the requested transformed-noise moments step by step at B=B0, distinguished general residual-noise moments from Gaussian covariance-product simplifications, retained the manuscript in the common diag(B)=1 chart, and updated the M52 handoff plus planning surfaces.

user_inputs.text: Work on task M54: derive transformed-noise moments step by step at B=B0, distinguish independent residual noise from Gaussian covariance-product simplifications, and decide whether the manuscript keeps diag(B)=1 or needs a unit-variance/rotation-chart rewrite task.

agent_actions.description: Added manuscript/derivations/m54-stepwise-transformed-noise-moments.md, patched draft.md, and updated task-board, dashboard, paper-map, source-packet, workplan, decision-log, session-log, codex-log, and formal-object-registry.json to reflect the retained chart choice and the unblocked M52 rebuild.
